- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
  Summary: File created at .github/copilot-instructions.md.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: Project requirements were already provided by the user (Django + HTML/CSS/JS gym site with customer DB storage).

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Created Django project `gymsite`, app `members`, and virtual environment in the workspace root.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Added customer model, form, views, routes, templates, static CSS/JS, and admin configuration.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No extensions required because no setup info specified any extension to install.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Installed dependencies, created and applied migrations, and passed `manage.py check` with no issues.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Created and launched VS Code task `Run Django Server` using `.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe manage.py runserver`.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Summary: Project launched in development mode via task at http://127.0.0.1:8000/.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: Added README.md with setup/run instructions and cleaned this file by removing HTML comments.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
